transcript: Hey, this is Rusty Savage, your neighbor.
What number are you callin', dude?
Ah, that ain't important, brother. I saw you messin' with my levers and pivots, and I'd like 'em back.
Tell me this ain't gonna happen again, partner.
Hey, you ain't my partner, so I don't know who the fuck you are, so...
How about if I took it out on your face with my feet?
